rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Gov't Code §1477.302 governs county authority for visitor/tourist attractions. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: A county may establish, acquire, lease as lessor or lessee, construct, improve, enlarge, equip, repair, operate, or maintain:
_note: No overlap between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this county tourist-attraction authority statute.
